_comment: Source of truth for all user-facing strings. Codegen emits per-platform files via scripts/gen-strings.mjs. Resolver chain: Member.locale -> Household.locale -> device -> en-US. See keel playbook 08-string-catalog-i18n.md.

errors._comment: CF wire codes route through these keys via cfErrorHandler. Add a new entry when you add a new HttpsError code.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.invalid-argument: That doesn't look right. Please check and try again.
